name.title: Plugin Name
name.description: This name will be displayed in the Homebridge log.

climateIPs.description: The IP addresses of the Daikin climate devices to be controlled.

climateKeys.description: 13-digit keys for secure (BRP072C) adapters. One entry per device, in the form { "<ip exactly as written in climateIPs>": "<key>" }. Edited from the device list in the settings UI.

debugMode.title: Debug Mode
debugMode.description: When enabled, debug messages will be written to the log.
